description: Create the foundational files for the wc-mcp package. package.json must match the spec in planning.md section 8 exactly: name=wc-mcp, version=0.1.0, type=module, bin pointing to build/index.js, runtime deps limited to @modelcontextprotocol/sdk and zod only, engines node>=20. tsconfig.json: strict=true, module=NodeNext, moduleResolution=NodeNext, target=ES2022, outDir=build, rootDir=src, declaration=true, declarationMap=true, sourceMap=true. Reference the Helix project at /Volumes/Development/helix for a working example of a correctly configured NodeNext ESM TypeScript project — use it as a sanity check for tsconfig settings, not as a template to copy. src/index.ts: shebang line, Server and StdioServerTransport imports, loadConfig call, all tool group registrations stubbed, server.connect(transport). vitest.config.ts with coverage-v8 and fixture paths. .gitignore, .npmrc with engine-strict=true.
title: Scaffold package.json, tsconfig.json, and server entry point

descriptionHistory.description: Create the foundational files for the wc-mcp package. package.json must exactly match the spec in planning.md section 8: name=wc-mcp, version=0.1.0, type=module, bin pointing to build/index.js, runtime deps limited to @modelcontextprotocol/sdk and zod only, engines node>=20. tsconfig.json: strict=true, module=NodeNext, moduleResolution=NodeNext, target=ES2022, outDir=build, rootDir=src, declaration=true, declarationMap=true, sourceMap=true. src/index.ts: shebang line, imports for Server and StdioServerTransport from SDK, loadConfig call, all tool group registrations, server.connect(transport). This is a stub — tool registration functions will return empty arrays until handlers are built. vitest.config.ts with coverage-v8 and fixture paths. .gitignore, .npmrc with engine-strict=true.
